name: Wand of Binding
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Hold Monster or Web. The wand regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
description: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Detect Evil and Good or Detect Thoughts. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.
properties: Cast Detect Evil and Good/Detect Thoughts

name: Wand of Fear
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Fear. The wand regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Wand of Fireballs
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Fireball (level 5). The wand regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Lightning Bolt (level 5). The wand regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Wand of Magic Detection
description: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Detect Magic or Detect Thoughts. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Magic Missile. The wand regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Wand of Paralysis
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Hold Person. The wand regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Wand of Polymorph
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Polymorph. The wand regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Wand of Secrets
description: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Locate Object or See Invisibility. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Wand of the War Mage (+1)
description: This wand has a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you have a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Wand of the War Mage (+2)
description: This wand has a +2 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you have a +2 bonus to spell attack rolls.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Wand of the War Mage (+3)
description: This wand has a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you have a +3 bonus to spell attack rolls.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

name: Weapon, +1, +2, or +3
description: You have a bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus is determined by its rarity.

name: Well of Many Worlds
description: This well is a portal to various planes of existence. While standing at the edge of the well, you can take a Magic action to peer into the well and see different planes.

name: Winged Boots
description: While wearing these boots, you have a Fly Speed of 30 feet (or 40 feet if you're not carrying heavy loads). The boots have 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.
properties: Fly Speed 30 ft. (40 ft. without heavy load)

name: Wings of Flying
description: This pair of wings can be attached to your back. While attached, you have a Fly Speed of 60 feet. The wings can be detached and reattached as a Magic action.
properties: Can be attached/detached as Magic action

name: Yklwa of the Ancients
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, you can expend 1 charge to deal extra 1d6 Force damage.
